hero.headline: Your digital workshop assistant
hero.subline: Track components, plan maintenance, never miss a service again.

features.title: Everything your workshop needs
features.subtitle: Six reasons why BikeFloor revolutionizes your bike management.

tracking.title: Component Tracking
tracking.description: Monitor km-based wear for every single component — from chain to tire.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Planning
maintenance.description: Define service intervals and get reminders before anything becomes overdue.

strava.title: Strava Sync
strava.description: Connect Strava and import rides automatically — kilometers count themselves.

inventory.title: Parts Inventory
inventory.description: Manage spare parts and install them on your bike with a single click.

workshop.title: Workshop Connection
workshop.description: Save your dealer and send repair requests directly from the app.

multibike.title: Multi-Bike
multibike.description: Road, MTB, gravel, commuter — manage all your bikes in one place.

step2.description: Link your Strava account for automatic ride imports.

step3.title: Maintenance under control
step3.description: BikeFloor tracks wear and reminds you about services in time.

bottomCta.title: Ready for the overview?

overview.title: Overview
overview.text: BikeFloor takes the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy informs you about what data we collect and how we use it.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.text: When you use BikeFloor, we collect the following data:
dataCollection.item1: Email address and password upon registration
dataCollection.item2: Bike data (type, manufacturer, model, components, mileage)

strava.title: Strava Integration
strava.text: When you connect your Strava account, we import ride data (distance, duration, date) to automatically update mileage. You can disconnect at any time in the settings. We do not store Strava credentials — authentication is handled via OAuth 2.0.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.text: Your data is securely stored with Supabase (EU region). Uploaded documents are stored encrypted. We do not share your data with third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: BikeFloor only uses technically necessary cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.item3: Delete your data (delete account in settings)
rights.item4: Export your data (Excel export in settings)

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, please reach us at the address provided in the imprint.

responsible.title: Responsible according to § 5 TMG

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The contents of this app were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. BikeFloor serves as a tool for maintenance planning — the actual inspection and maintenance of your bicycle is your responsibility.
